invariant_descriptions.CJS-0: ConstitutionalJury.deliberate() is the sole authority for high-stakes mutation evaluation. Any mutation touching HIGH_STAKES_PATHS MUST be routed through deliberate() before promotion.
invariant_descriptions.CJS-QUORUM-0: Majority verdict requires >= MAJORITY_REQUIRED (2-of-3) approve votes. jury_size < JURY_SIZE raises ConstitutionalJuryConfigError at construction.
invariant_descriptions.CJS-DETERM-0: JuryDecision.decision_digest = sha256(mutation_id:majority_verdict:approve_count:jury_size). Seeds derived from mutation_id + index only. No datetime.now(), random, or uuid4.
invariant_descriptions.CJS-DISSENT-0: All dissenting verdicts MUST be appended to the dissent ledger before deliberate() returns. InvariantDiscoveryEngine relies on this feed for constitutional rule derivation.
invariant_descriptions.CJS-PERSIST-0: _persist() and _record_dissent() MUST use Path.open in append mode — never builtins.open. Ledgers are append-only; no overwrites permitted.

notes: Innovation #14 — Constitutional Jury System. ConstitutionalJury.deliberate() convenes 3 independent evaluators with deterministic seeds. 2-of-3 quorum determines majority_verdict. Dissenting verdicts feed InvariantDiscoveryEngine for constitutional rule derivation. World-first: governed multi-agent jury deliberation for autonomous mutation promotion decisions.
